properties.description: Data Flow to pull data from ADLS Raw to Synapse Stage.

typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		ECI_ID as string,
		PROJ_NB as string,
		R_CODE as string,
		R_SUPP as string,
		ACTUAL_IND as string,
		ORDER_SEQ as string,
		SHORT_DESC as string,
		SCHEDULED_DATE as string,
		PLANNED_DATE as string,
		ACTUAL_DATE as string,
		ECI_COMMENT as string,
		ECI_ATTR_4 as string,
		DISCIPLINE as string,
		DEPARTMENT as string,
		PLANNED_BUYER as string,
		REQ_DESC as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	wildcardPaths:['Project_Data/NCSA/SMAT/RPSR/Latest_SMAT_RPSR_BB3.csv']) ~> srcSMATRPSRRaw
srcSMATRPSRRaw derive(PROJ_NB = iif(length(PROJ_NB)>5,concat('99', PROJ_NB),PROJ_NB)) ~> setProjNB
setProjNB sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	input(
		stage_smat_rpsr_id as integer,
		ECI_ID as string,
		PROJ_NB as string,
		R_CODE as string,
		R_SUPP as string,
		ACTUAL_IND as string,
		ORDER_SEQ as string,
		SHORT_DESC as string,
		SCHEDULED_DATE as string,
		PLANNED_DATE as string,
		ACTUAL_DATE as string,
		ECI_COMMENT as string,
		ECI_ATTR_4 as string,
		DISCIPLINE as string,
		DEPARTMENT as string,
		PLANNED_BUYER as string,
		REQ_DESC as string
	),
	deletable:false,
	insertable:true,
	updateable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	truncate:true,
	format: 'table',
	staged: true,
	allowCopyCommand: true,
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true,
	errorHandlingOption: 'stopOnFirstError') ~> snkSMATRPSRSynapse
